mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, which compresses consumer spending and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the goods and services demand proxy signals a weakening economy, which produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.08 over any 4-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.2).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the industrial production proxy signals a strengthening economy, which produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the monetary policy proxy signals a tightening monetary cycle, which produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.06 over any 4-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.15).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the labor market proxy signals a strengthening economy, which produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.07 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.25).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the goods and services supply proxy signals a weakening economy, which produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the demand proxy signals a strengthening economy, which produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 4-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the labor market proxy signals a weakening economy, which produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.09 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.2).
